CLASSIC TRIO

The Classic Bilao

Generous portions of three beloved favorites, beautifully arranged on fresh banana leaves.

Kutsinta

Chewy brown rice cake topped with sweet golden latik (toasted coconut curd).

~30 pieces per bilao
Pichi-Pichi

Soft, bouncy cassava cakes rolled in fresh grated coconut. Sweet, fragrant, and addictive.

~40 pieces per bilao
Puto

Fluffy steamed rice cakes in banana leaf cups. Some with cheese or salted egg on top.

~25 pieces per bilao
